c74object.name: tap.nr~
c74object.category: TapTools, MSP Filters, MSP FFT, MSP Modifiers
c74object.description: The tap.nr~ object implements a spectral expander/gate that silences FFT bins whose magnitude falls below a threshold. Unlike the original, this version is self-contained — it runs its own short-time Fourier transform internally, so it does not need to be hosted inside a pfft~. Latency is one FFT frame.

objarg.name: fftsize
objarg.description: The FFT size (a power of two). Defaults to 1024.

inlet.digest: Signal input. A float in this inlet sets the threshold.
Sets how gradually the threshold engages (the gate slope).

method.name: float
method.description: A float in the left inlet sets the threshold. A float in the right inlet sets how gradually the threshold will be engaged.

attribute.name: threshold
attribute.description: Linear-amplitude threshold. Bins below this level are attenuated; bins above it pass. 0 disables the gate (the output then reconstructs the input). Default 0.01.

attribute.name: slope
attribute.description: How gradually the gate engages across the threshold (a soft knee). Low values fade gently; high values approach a hard gate; 0 passes everything. Default 2.
